texto: Just then Trafton walked up to the four of us. "I can see this is a little gang on campus" said Trafton "How do I join?""Dial 1800 - not on your life and see how that works out for you," said LisabelleTafton smiled at her "I know that behind that harsh exterior you have a kind and gentle soul." "No" said Lisabelle "I really don't. I'm pretty much always this unpleasant with the desired result of being left alone. Why am I not being left alone?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Maddy Edwards que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “Just then Trafton walked up to the four of us. "I can see this is a little gang on campus" said T…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, humour, trafton, com foco em trabalho e reflexao.
